description: Compatible doc topics for the coherence gate's chunks_off_topic path. Each entry maps a NARROW topic to a list of broader/adjacent topics whose docs the gate should accept as on-topic. Used by `pipeline_d/_coherence_gate.py::_count_support_topic_key_matches` to widen the topic_key match without lowering the existing threshold.
rationale: The 2026-04-26 thin-corpus diagnostic + §1.A deployment measured that 4/12 thin-corpus topics still refuse with `chunks_off_topic` even after §1.A's article-level fix. Root cause: those topics have 3-6 native docs in Supabase, but hybrid_search ranking pushes broader-topic chunks above them, so the support_documents bundle rarely contains 2+ docs tagged with the narrow topic. This config tells the gate 'docs tagged with topic X are also acceptable evidence for queries routed to narrow topic Y'.

curation_policy.scope: Only SME-validated topical adjacencies. Each entry should reflect 'a senior contador would consider docs of topic A as legitimate evidence for a question about topic B'. NOT a contamination relaxation — the existing 2-doc match threshold still applies.
curation_policy.value: list of broader/adjacent topic keys that count as 'compatible evidence'.
curation_policy.review: Every entry should reference its evidence source (Phase-2 cross-topic measurement OR SME response).
curation_policy.non_relaxation: The 2-doc threshold (_SUPPORT_DOC_TOPIC_KEY_MATCH_MIN) is unchanged. We only widen WHAT counts as a match. Per `feedback_thresholds_no_lower`.

conciliacion_fiscal.rationale: Conciliación fiscal es transversal — toca procedimiento (formato 2516, plazos), declaracion_renta (libro 1 base gravable) y costos_deducciones_renta (diferencias contables vs fiscales). Phase-2 measured 44 mentions in procedimiento_tributario, 17 in declaracion_renta, 7 in costos_deducciones_renta — los tres son los top-3 owners de cross-topic refs en chunks de conciliacion_fiscal.

impuesto_patrimonio_personas_naturales.rationale: El SME response line 178 explicitly said 'incluir conexión con conciliación 2516 (campo F2 patrimonio)'. Phase-2 measured patrimonio_fiscal_renta as 33 mentions (94% de cross-topic refs), declaracion_renta 1 mention. Ambos son legitimate evidence para una pregunta sobre impuesto al patrimonio de personas naturales.

precios_de_transferencia.rationale: Precios de transferencia es sub-régimen de declaracion_renta (Art. 260 ss del ET). Phase-2 measured declaracion_renta as 111 mentions (76% de cross-topic refs), renta_liquida_gravable 21. Aceptamos ambos como evidence compatible.
